simple_types.name: Content_Type
simple_types.code:
type Content_Type is
   (Number,
    Alpha,
    Program,
    Assignment,
    Unkown) with
   Default_Value => Unkown;

array_types.name: Digit_Array
array_types.code:
type Digit_Array is
   array (Position_Type range <>)
   of Digit_Type with
   Default_Component_Value => 16#0#;

array_types.name: Register_Array

subtypes.name: Hex_String
Null_Register_Digit_Array
Position_Type
subtypes.code: subtype Position_Type is Positive range 1 .. 1_024 * Registers.Digits_Per_Register + 1;
